name: Proposal Engagement
summary: Scores each Deep Funding Portal user (by DID) from proposal outcomes and ratings.
description:
### What it does
Scores proposal owners based on proposal results and community ratings.

### How it works
- Every Deep Funding Portal user is scored, keyed by their DID.
- Funded and completed proposals add points.
- Unfunded proposals remove points.
- Better ratings increase rewards and reduce penalties.
- Older proposals can lose weight over time.

### Limits
Only rounds 31, 36, and 107 are included because ownership data is reliable there.

### Data source
Uses proposal, user, and review data from DeepFunding. Each proposal's owners are attributed to their DIDs.

### Output
- CSV file with `did` and `proposal_engagement`.
- JSON file with score details for each scored user and proposal.

inputs.label: Funded Proposal Reward
inputs.description: How much a funded and completed proposal increases the score. Use `0` for no reward.

inputs.label: Unfunded Proposal Penalty
inputs.description: How much an unfunded proposal reduces the score. Use `0` for no penalty.

inputs.label: Lookback Window (Months)
inputs.description: Only proposals from this number of past months are scored.

inputs.label: Monthly Decay Rate (%)
inputs.description: Percent removed from a proposal score for each month of age. Use `0` for no decay.

outputs.label: Proposal Engagement (CSV)
outputs.description: CSV file with one row per user and the final proposal engagement score.

columns.description: Final proposal engagement score for the user.

outputs.label: Proposal Engagement Details (JSON)
outputs.description: JSON file with score details and skip reasons for each scored user and proposal.
